focus: Sync latest demand-data-generation active artifact and make welding demand available in assessment reports.
reasonStarted: The upstream demand data added a welding sector with Keyword Planner monthly counts for some search terms.

new: A welding website should be classified as Welding demand when public page evidence contains welding service terms.
Welding demand records from the active upstream artifact should be evaluated in Customer Demand Fit.
Demand opportunities should show estimated monthly searches when Keyword Planner count data is available.
Demand records with null monthly_searches should continue to render safely without inventing volume.
Monthly search count should help order opportunities without replacing the existing priority-weighted demand score.
reused: Generated demand data remains owned by demand-data-generation and consumed as a release artifact.
Unsupported or unclear website industries skip demand scoring honestly.
Customer Demand Fit must keep found evidence, missing signals, confidence, and pages checked traceable.

architecturalChanges: Added welding as a supported demand sector in the assessment app.
Exposed optional monthly search volume in demand records and opportunities while keeping null volume safe.

validation.build: passed with existing documented Turbopack tracing warning
validation.cloudflareBuild: passed with existing documented OpenNext tsconfig warning

knownRisks: The assessment app still consumes demand data by copied release artifact; automated upstream sync remains deferred.
Monthly search counts are available only for some welding terms and are displayed only when present.
Production and staging will not include this change until it is committed, pushed to the correct branch, and deployed through the release gate.
